# Third-party dependency

PDF Rights Cleaner embeds the official Windows x64 distribution of qpdf at build time.

Download qpdf 12.3.2 and extract it to:

```text
third_party/qpdf-12.3.2/qpdf-12.3.2-msvc64
```

The qpdf binaries are not committed to this repository. Their license is embedded in the generated executable.
